message:
feat: Implement codeobject.zig TODO stubs with real functionality

- PyCode_New: Get code size from bytes object, calculate ncellvars/nfreevars
  from tuple sizes, copy bytecode to co_code_adaptive
- PyCode_Addr2Line: Full linetable decoding (Python 3.11+ format)
- PyCode_GetCode: Create bytes from co_code_adaptive
- PyCode_GetVarnames: Extract first nlocals from co_localsplusnames
- PyCode_GetCellvars: Extract cellvars from co_localsplusnames[nlocals:]
- PyCode_GetFreevars: Extract freevars from co_localsplusnames[nlocals+ncellvars:]
- PyUnstable_Code_GetExtra/SetExtra: Implement co_extra array access
- PyCode_AddWatcher/ClearWatcher: Implement global watcher array (8 slots)
- PyCode_Optimize: Return code unchanged (legacy API)
- code_new: Full argument parsing for code() constructor

Reduces TODO count from 38 to 23 (15 eliminated).
